---
title: "Marketing ROI Analysis"
author: "Aryaman Dhindsa"
date: April 2,2026
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self-contained: true # bundles everything into one html file
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    fontsize: 11pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---



```{r Loading Libraries}
# Loading all the required libraries
library(tinytex)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```
